case_title: SEARS, ROEBUCK AND CO., A NEW YORK CORPORATION vs. CABEZA, GLADYS et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEARS, ROEBUCK AND CO., A NEW YORK CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CABEZA, GLADYS DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-17-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-30-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-17-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-17-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
